features: [Relax and Improve] : Electric heating waist belt relaxes skin, improves circulation, and relieves waist discomfort with advanced heating technology.
[Customizable Temperature] : Three settings (55°c, 48°c, 42°c) for a comfortable experience based on individual needs and different seasons.
[Versatile Use] : Targeted heat care for lower abdomen, hands, and waist, promoting recovery and discomfort relief for all-around comfort.
[Portable Relief] : Lightweight and easy to carry, suitable for home, office, or travel for on-the-go relaxation and relief.
[Adjustable Support] : Fit for various waist circumferences, providing tailored support and pressure relief for abdomen, hands, and waist.
description: [Relax and Improve] : Electric heating waist belt relaxes skin, improves circulation, and relieves waist discomfort with advanced heating technology. [Customizable Temperature] : Three settings (55°c, 48°c, 42°c) for a comfortable experience based on individual needs and different seasons. [Versatile Use] : Targeted heat care for lower abdomen, hands, and waist, promoting recovery and discomfort relief for all-around comfort. [Portable Relief] : Lightweight and easy to carry, suitable for home, office, or travel for on-the-go relaxation and relief. [Adjustable Support] : Fit for various waist circumferences, providing tailored support and pressure relief for abdomen, hands, and waist. Spec: Item Type: Warming Waist Belt Material: Plush Temperature: Red Lighting: 55 degree centigrade, Blue Lighting: 48 degree centigrade, Green Lighting: 42 degree centigrade Package List: 1 x Warming Waist Belt 1 x Instruction Manual 1 x USB Cable How To Use: Connect one end of the USB cable to the waist belt and the other end to the power bank or USB port. Press and hold the power button for 3 seconds to start. Choose the appropriate gear: low gear (green lighting, 42 degree centigrade), medium gear (blue lighting, 48 degree centigrade), high gear (red lighting, 55 degree centigrade). Remove the power bank and plug in a timely manner after use.
